title: CapX1 [ASMR Bedwars Edition]
description: A Bedwars Edtition of the Capx1 [ASMR Edition].
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Tow77vQU/images/49bf466e1ff478607d6dd00015e59357ad53fa25.png)

#  The Bedwars Edition of the CapX1 [ASMR Edition]!  💥


Changes common Minecraft sounds such as dig, attack and more! This resource pack is tailored towards Bedwars players, but can be used by none Bedwars players too!

**Choose a your desired combo of sounds from the Versions tab!**  Each version is labeled according to the sounds in the resourcepack.  For example: if you wanted to make you sound like you are drag clicking, then download the *Drag Clicking* version, or if you want the *Keychron V6 and Logitech G Pro Superlight* combo version, download that one, etc. 

Now you can sound like you're using a different keyboard and mouse!

Follow the project to be updated on future versions!

**Enjoy!**
